prose:
The frontier-orbital energies and gap for furan were computed using Density Functional Theory (DFT) at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (chemkit tier `standard`) in PySCF, gas phase, with charge 0 and multiplicity 1. The calculation was a single point on the geometry provided in `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz`. Density fitting was not used. The SCF converged in 9 cycles.

The HOMO energy is -6.3597638 eV.
The LUMO energy is -0.1024036 eV.
The HOMO-LUMO gap is 6.2573602 eV.
